metadata.maturity_notes: Lite diagnostic variant; inherits the parent maturity tier but should be evaluated separately because it has smaller scope and less bespoke hook coverage.
metadata.coordination_type: threshold control against a tactical defender
metadata.challenge_summary: The heroes must coordinate door timing and target priority against Warden as a tactical ReAct defender.
dilemmas: Waiting gives defenders time to form a line
The standard can be searched for reward or destroyed for tempo
warden_runbook: Retreat wounded guards behind the sentinel
Do not suicide defenders into obvious kill zones
metadata.lite_focus: Four-room keep: two doors, one rally object, one sentinel, and a clear test of whether agents avoid opening both fronts.
non_copy_safety_notes: Original compact layout and original scenario text.
Targets abstract cooperative dungeon-crawl dynamics rather than protected quest content.
Uses MARL challenge metadata as the design contract.
metadata.classic_dynamic_role_dilemma: hold doors and avoid feeding the Warden multiple open fronts
metadata.classic_dynamic_warden_pressure: use thresholds, guards, and dread to punish bad breach order
metadata.classic_dynamic_extraction_hook: objective extraction tests whether the breach lane stays open

entry_room.name: Entry Room
entry_room.description: The entry into Black Standard Keep is intentionally small: enough space to form a plan, not enough to hide poor coordination.

upper_right.name: Upper Right
upper_right.description: A compact pressure room isolates the challenge: opponent-aware breach sequencing.

lower_left.name: Lower Left
lower_left.description: An optional route/cache tests whether the agents understand the dungeon's MARL axis instead of chasing reward blindly.

lower_right.name: Lower Right
lower_right.description: An optional route/cache tests whether the agents understand the dungeon's MARL axis instead of chasing reward blindly.

furniture.name: Black Standard
furniture.description: Primary clue object for opponent-aware breach sequencing. It should teach agents what kind of coordination this dungeon rewards.

furniture.name: Optional Cache
furniture.description: Optional reward that is safe only when the team has solved the core coordination problem first.

furniture.name: Support Marker
furniture.description: A small support object that makes the non-damaging coordination action visible in transcript review.

achievements.title: Read the Lite Clue
achievements.description: Search the focus object that explains opponent-aware breach sequencing.

achievements.title: Open the First Lite Door
achievements.description: Open the first door and trigger a reveal-boundary planning step.

achievements.title: Send a Coordination Message
achievements.description: Use communication instead of silent independent wandering.

scripts.lite_design_note: Four-room keep: two doors, one rally object, one sentinel, and a clear test of whether agents avoid opening both fronts.
scripts.warden_style: threshold control against a tactical defender

core_failure_modes: failure to protect the coordination-critical agent

preferred_tactics: Retreat wounded guards behind the sentinel
use thresholds, guards, and dread to punish bad breach order
forbidden_tactics: spawn pressure without a visible or scripted cue
use unrevealed map geometry for perfect counterplay
erase the dungeon-specific lesson with generic monster spam

classic_dynamic.warden: use thresholds, guards, and dread to punish bad breach order
classic_dynamic.extraction: objective extraction tests whether the breach lane stays open

monster_activation.notes: Lite variants keep monsters dormant until reveal so smaller LLMs can replan at clear boundaries.

search_categories.notes: Lite variants emphasize explicit search/action choices and communication.

iron_sentinel_1.name: Standard Sentinel
iron_sentinel_1.public_summary: Lite boss for opponent-aware breach sequencing; it should test coordination before raw damage.
iron_sentinel_1.counterplay_hint: Search the focus object and coordinate roles before committing to damage.
iron_sentinel_1.defeat_description: Defeat Standard Sentinel after using the lite challenge's coordination lesson.
